name: Octanex Limited
summary: Octanex Limited, together with its subsidiaries, invests in, explores, and develops natural resources in Western Australia. It holds 100% interest in the Ascalon Gas field located in Bonaparte, Western Australia. The company also holds interest in the Sefton Gold Project located in the Eastern Goldfields Superterrane, Western Australia. Octanex Limited was incorporated in 1980 and is based in South Yarra, Australia.
